summary: Round-2 wording is resolved, but the new component summary can still misreport parked state-managed Skills as enabled.

findings.title: State-managed parked skills are counted as enabled in StationGrid component tiles
findings.recommendation: Derive parked/enabled from the record's management model, e.g. count `rec.presence === "parked"` for presence-managed records and `rec.state === "parked"` for state-managed records, so Skills do not show parked items as enabled.
